testcase.name: test_import_returns_correct_counts
test_import_updates_existing_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_import.py:191: in test_import_updates_existing_data assert result2["results"]["members"]["updated"] >= 1, \ ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'updated'

testcase.name: test_import_handles_attendance_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_import.py:223: in test_import_handles_attendance_data print(f" - Attendance updated: {result['results']['attendance']['updated']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'updated'

testcase.name: test_import_handles_guests_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_import.py:257: in test_import_handles_guests_data print(f" - Guests updated: {result['results']['guests']['updated']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'updated'
